description: Reusable templates and configurations shared across all domains. Loaded once and merged with domain-specific data.
jira_activities_pool: Final sprint review, retrospective, release notes, and stakeholder demo
prerequisites_template: Interest in learning {domain} through practical labs
learning_outcomes_template: Understand {domain} concepts from foundation to implementation
Complete daily hands-on labs and milestone assignments
Use industry tools in realistic project workflows
Complete final capstone and certification roadmap review
learning_objectives_per_day_template: Apply {topic} in a real-world delivery scenario
Connect the technical work to Agile/Jira delivery tracking
jira_practice_per_day_template: Create/update Epics, Stories, Tasks, Subtasks, acceptance criteria, and story points
Move tasks across the sprint board and review progress with comments/time logs
hiring_and_test_prep: Screening Test: 30-45 minute MCQ/practical test covering core {domain} concepts and tools
Practical Assignment: hands-on task aligned with the client training requirement
Mock Interview: trainer explains concepts, tools, troubleshooting approach, and delivery examples
Trainer Demo: 15-20 minute sample teaching session with Q&A
Evaluation Checklist: communication, technical depth, lab readiness, real-time examples, and client fit
assessment_plan: Daily knowledge check or lab review
Weekly practical assignment for programs longer than 5 days
Mid-program project review for 20+ day programs
Final capstone demo and viva-style technical discussion
project_management: Jira - epics, stories, tasks, sprint board, reports
trainer_notes_template: Generated by the Training TOC Agent from the curriculum knowledge base. Gemini may be used only for optional wording polish.
program_overview_template: This {duration}-day {domain} program is generated by the Training TOC Agent using a structured domain curriculum. It combines concepts, daily labs, Agile/Jira practice, milestone reviews, and a final capstone for {level} learners in {mode} mode.
